title.description: Igama lohlelo eliboniswa esihlokweni. Uhlelo lokuthola izindlela zokupheka zama-cuisine zomhlaba wonke.

subtitle.text: Thola izindlela zokupheka ezivela emhlabeni wonke
subtitle.description: Itagline eboniswa ngaphansi kwegama lohlelo esihlokweni.

heroTitle.description: Isihloko esiyinhloko esigabeni se-hero ekhasini lasekhaya.

heroSubtitle.text: Bheka izindlela zokupheka eziyiqiniso ezivela emakishini emhlabeni wonke
heroSubtitle.description: Umbhalo wesihlokwana ovezwa ngaphansi kwesihloko se-hero ekhasini lasekhaya.

featuredTitle.description: Isihloko sesigaba esivezwe ngaphezu kwegridi yekhadi lezindlela zokupheka.

cookingTime.description: Ilebula lesikhathi sokupheka ekhadini lenqubo yokupheka. {minutes} lifakwa ngenani lemizuzu.

difficulty.description: Ilebula eboniswa ngaphambi kwezinga lobunzima ekhadini lenqubo yokupheka.

easy.description: Ilebula lezinga lobunzima elikhombisa indlela elula yokupheka.

medium.description: Ilebula lezinga lobunzima elikhombisa indlela yokupheka enobunzima obulinganiselwe.

hard.description: Ilebula lezinga lobunzima elikhombisa indlela yokupheka enzima.

ramenDescription.text: Ukubhaka okunothile kwemathambo enkukhu okuqukethe i-chashu ethambile, iqanda eliphekiwe kahle, kanye nama-noodle amasha.

margheritaDescription.text: I-pizza ye-Neapolitan yendabuko enotamatisi be-San Marzano, i-mozzarella entsha, kanye nebhesil.

tacosName.description: Igama lenqubo yokupheka i-Tacos al Pastor.

tacosDescription.text: Ama-tacos enyama yengulube ehlanganiswe nopinephu, i-cilantro, no-anyanisi phezu kwama-tortilla ekhukhamba.
tacosDescription.description: Incazelo yenqubo yokupheka i-Tacos al Pastor.

butterChickenDescription.text: Inkukhu ethambile esosi yetamatisi enobisi kanye namafutha anamakha anuka kahle.

padThaiDescription.text: Ama-noodle erayisi aphekiwe kanye ne-shrimp, tofu, ama-peanut, kanye nesosi ye-tamarind.

crepesDescription.text: Ama-crepes amancane, acwebile agcwele i-Nutella, ama-strawberry amasha, kanye nokhilimu oshaywe.

label.description: Ilebula elitholakalayo le-dropdown yokushintsha ulimi esihlokweni.
